claim: Collectible Brussels is a fair exclusively dedicated to contemporary collectible design — unique pieces, bespoke works, and very limited editions of the 21st century.
quote: COLLECTIBLE is a fair exclusively dedicated to contemporary collectible design gathering unique pieces, bespoke works and very limited editions of the 21st century.

claim: The fair's BESPOKE section is a platform for independent studios showing commissioned or made-to-order works; the 2026 edition ran 12-15 March at the Vanderborght Building.
quote: BESPOKE offers a platform for independent studios showing commissioned or made to order works.

claim: Ceramic Brussels 2026 ran 21-25 January at Tour & Taxis with 75 Belgian and international galleries showing more than 200 artists from ~30 countries.
quote: 75 Belgian & international galleries... over 200 artists from approximately thirty countries.

claim: La Gadoue Atelier — Eloïse Maës and Audrey Werthle — is a ceramics and textiles studio in Anderlecht using 3D printing, casting, and manual sheet-metal construction.
quote: Eloïse Maës and Audrey Werthle use different ceramic techniques such as 3D printing, casting, and manual sheet metal construction.

claim: Au Charbon is a Brussels non-profit collective at Quai des Charbonnages 78 housing ~12 ateliers across ceramics, illustration, bookbinding, leather goods, furniture, textiles, and arts research.
quote: Au Charbon is a non-profit organisation in the city centre of Brussels that promotes the Arts with a focus on craft and design.

claim: Atelier Decoster makes leather goods entirely handmade in Belgium — only on demand — with bespoke options including 22k gold initials, edge painting, thread color and exotic skins.
quote: Each Decoster article is entirely handmade in Belgium (from the cuts to the seams) and is made only on demand.

claim: Atelier Louie hand-cuts and saddle-stitches vegetable-tanned leather goods in its Brussels workshop and offers a bespoke service for clients.
quote: Hand-stitched bags and small leather goods... a bespoke service, working closely with our clients to create their perfect bag.

claim: Saskia Shutt's Brussels workshop in Centre Dansaert takes ~6 weeks per commission, using Fairmined gold/silver or recycled platinum; remodelling of family heirlooms is offered.
quote: Jewellery commissions take approximately 6 weeks to make, from date of purchase... Fairmined gold/silver or recycled platinum.

claim: Other Brussels jewellers taking bespoke work include Xavier Maury (goldsmith + 3D printing/laser welding), Martine Hermans / Skin & Soul (body-imprint pieces, Ixelles), Olivia Hainaut (resin/leather/silver), NOJ, and Christa Reniers (lost-wax silver/gold).
quote: Saskia Shutt... Xavier Maury... Martine Hermans... Olivia Hainaut... NOJ - Non Ordinary Jewelry... Christa Reniers.

claim: Verduyn Studio in Zonnebeke designs custom brutalist/minimalist furniture using a five-step workflow from briefing through 3D rendering, production, and delivery/install.
quote: Bespoke brutalist and minimalist furniture pieces tailored to your needs — from statement dining tables... to office desks.

claim: Shedded.be (Brussels) makes 'one-of-a-kind pieces, handcrafted in Belgium' — tables, bars, shoe racks and smaller wood items by Jonas, quoted on request.
quote: One-of-a-kind pieces, handcrafted in Belgium.

claim: Marina Bautier runs a Brussels workshop next to her shop, café and rental apartments and is described as a master of modernist oak furniture.
quote: A master of modernist oak furniture with a Brussels studio next to her own shop, café, and rental apartments.

claim: GlazenHuis (Lommel) is the Flemish centre for contemporary glass art and offers commissions alongside workshops and residencies; the pavilion is closed for renovations until spring 2027.
quote: Glass artists, designers, and students work in its glass studio... commissions... closed for renovations until spring 2027.

claim: Galerij Theaxus, Dorothea Van De Winkel's studio in Kwaremont, hand-weaves tapestries up to 240×185 cm — a single piece can take 4-5 months at eight hours a day.
quote: Tapestry pieces up to 240 by 185 centimetres on the loom, with the largest pieces taking four to five months of eight hours a day to complete.

claim: Aristide Najean creates one-off luminous sculptures and light installations in his Murano furnace 'the Cathedral'; clients include Guerlain and architects Wilmotte, Jouin and Starck.
quote: Najean creates in his own glass factory – the Cathedral – luminous sculptures, light installations and works of art; unique pieces.

claim: Wave Murano Glass (Roberto Beltrami, Murano) takes individual bespoke commissions and runs a 'Design Your Own Piece' experience where clients collaborate at the furnace in real time.
quote: Design Your Own Piece... clients can collaborate with artisans at the furnace to create custom pieces in real-time.

claim: Muller Van Severen — the Ghent design duo of Fien Muller and Hannes Van Severen — debuted human-sized candelabras at Milan Design Week 2026; their pieces are handmade in small editions.
quote: Muller Van Severen creates human-sized candelabras for Milan design week.

claim: Piet Hein Eek's Eindhoven complex — a former Philips factory — covers 10,000 m² and employs ~100 people, ~50 in the factory; he produces scrap-wood furniture and accepts commissions.
quote: 10,000 m² space, and around one hundred people are employed at the site, with some fifty working in the factory.

claim: BeCraft (Mons) is the professional association promoting applied arts in Wallonia/Brussels — directory, exhibition space, and triennials in jewellery and ceramics/glass.
quote: Professional association promoting Applied Arts in the Wallonia and Brussels regions... showcases the work of craftspeople online.

claim: Sonian (Brussels) is an atelier specialising in local hardwood with state-of-the-art fabrication facilities for bespoke interiors.
quote: Atelier in the heart of Brussels, Belgium offering state-of-the-art fabrication facilities and expertise in working with local hardwood species.

claim: Rombachs Glass is an Antwerp atelier with two glory holes, cooling ovens and cold-working machines for grinding and polishing.
quote: Atelier equipped with coldworking machines for grinding and polishing, with a hotshop consisting of two glory holes and cooling ovens.

claim: La Gadoue's profile on the Belgian applied-arts directory BeCraft confirms the studio's positioning as designers and craftswomen specialising in textiles and ceramics.
quote: Designers and craftswomen who specialize in textiles and ceramics.

claim: Studio Cuoio is an Antwerp leather-goods design and production house developing custom and high-end accessories for luxury brands.
quote: Antwerp-based leather goods consulting studio that partners with luxury brands to develop and produce custom-made and high-end leather and vegan skin accessories.

claim: The Fondation Bernardaud (Limoges) presents 'Ceramic Generation' — 20 young international ceramists — from 19 June 2026 to 30 April 2027 at the historic porcelain manufacturing site.
quote: From June 19, 2026 to April 30, 2027, the Fondation d'entreprise Bernardaud presents works by 20 young international artists representing the Ceramic Generation.
